description: Workspace fixture for C7 D75 real-wire RAG-via-MCP end-to-end. Binds the c3 RealWireMCPClientAdapter (mcp-server-ext:mcp-real-wire-adapter 0.2.0) and the c7 RealWireRAGSpecialist (rag-via-mcp-ext:rag-realwire-specialist 0.2.0). The specialist's required-adapter-bindings resolves to the adapter binding via the 'mcp-server-ext:mcp-real-wire-adapter' provision identifier (per Specialist.attach_workspace lookup by binding_dict['provision']). Exercises closure items (c) + (f) per D68 §C via in-process MCP server harness per scope-cut C12.
